mentions.occurrence_sentence: In a study published today in _Nature_, a team of engineers at University of New South Wales (UNSW) Sydney has done what a celebrated scientist first suggested in 1961 was possible, but has eluded everyone since: controlling the nucleus of a single atom using only electric fields.

occurrence_sentence: This discovery means that we now have a pathway to build quantum computers using single-atom spins without the need for any oscillating magnetic field for their operation, says UNSW's Scientia Professor of Quantum Engineering Andrea Morello.
